clauses.title: Termination for material breach
clauses.text: Customer may terminate for material breach if the vendor fails to cure within 30 days of written notice.

clauses.title: Automatic renewal
clauses.text: The agreement renews automatically for one-year terms unless either party gives 60 days' notice.

clauses.title: Liability cap
clauses.text: Vendor liability is capped at fees paid in the prior 12 months.

clauses.title: Subprocessor usage
clauses.text: Vendor may process customer data using approved subprocessors listed in Annex B.

clauses.title: Data processing
clauses.text: Vendor may process customer data using approved subprocessors listed in Annex B.
